## Issue

XANADU_SENTINEL_BODY_PHRASE — installing react@19 produced peer-dep warnings the resolver couldn't reconcile.

## Root Cause

XANADU_SENTINEL_ROOT — multiple packages locked to react@18 transitively.

## Rule

XANADU_SENTINEL_RULE — always check `npm ls react` for transitive locks before bumping major versions.

notes: Smoke test for /lesson-resurface (CLA-25 + CLA-32). Pre-populates an archived lesson with three distinctive body sentinels, then asserts the helper emits the pointer + frontmatter fields AND does NOT leak any body sentinel into stdout — the pointer-only contract.
